properties.name: openvisionlab:toolchainMarkerInterpretation
properties.value: Legacy vtkConfigureDeprecated.h records Visual Studio 2019 MSVC 14.29.30133. _MSC_VER=1900 is emitted by VS2015-and-later STL yvals.h as an ABI-family marker, not an actual compiler-version conflict. Controlled v143 Release rebuild matches legacy Release paths, target contracts, directives, and link smoke; historical byte identity remains unresolved.

properties.name: openvisionlab:provenanceStatus
properties.value: Source identity, documented no-patch recipe, archive payload, packaged licenses, and transitive target/component closure are resolved; exact historical compiler invocation and source-to-binary reproducibility remain unresolved
